name: Wayne family
description:
All the kids that live there and Bruce has a g-tube or j-tube but no one knows why but only Bruce and Alfred does and mostly Tim is almost always on a feed because he barely eats same with Bruce but Bruce use it less then Tim and all of them have conditions and they all have their meds in their G-tube or J-tube and Alfred and Bruce injected them with their medication in the morning and when they need it and in a morning they always go in this order.

Here are the conditions for each kid:

Richard/ : PTSD and ADHD and slightly POTS and epilepsy

Jason: schizophrenia and PTSD and depression and smoking and drinking addiction

Tim: an eating disorder and ADHD and anxiety and PTSD and missing a spleen and narcoleptic and has insomnia

Damian: Autism and ADHD and PTSD

Cassandra/cass: PTSD and anxiety

Barbara: paralyzed and has PTSD

Duke: PTSD and diabetic

Stephane/steph: PTSD and IBS

Kate: PTSD and FND

Here are the conditions for the adults

Alfred: little bit of PTSD

Bruce: PTSD and insomnia and depression and anxiety and ADHD and autism
